import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import"./Bookings.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Bookings(){const[bookings,setBookings]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{fetchBookings();},[]);const fetchBookings=async()=>{try{const res=await axios.get("http://localhost/kawasaki-api/getBookings.php");setBookings(res.data);}catch(err){console.log(err);}};const deleteBooking=async id=>{if(!window.confirm("Delete this booking?"))return;try{const res=await axios.post("http://localhost/kawasaki-api/deleteBooking.php",{id:id},{headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}});if(res.data.status==="success"){alert("Deleted ✅");fetchBookings();// refresh table
}}catch(err){console.log(err);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bookings",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Test Ride Bookings"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Email"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Phone"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Bike"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Message"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Action"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:bookings.map((b,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:b.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:b.email}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:b.phone}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:b.bike_name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:b.message}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>deleteBooking(b.id),children:"Delete"})})]},index))})]})]});}
